_example.summary: Short text that is always visible.
_example.detail: Longer text that appears after clicking 'Read more'. Can be multi-line.

_colors: red = Error | yellow = Warning | green = Success | blue = Info (default)

items.title: Important: Installation issue due to signature error
items.summary: The EXE can no longer run as admin. A reinstall to a different location is required.
items.detail: Due to a signature issue, NullChat can no longer be executed as administrator. This means the 'Install for all users' option on Windows is currently unavailable. The application must be installed to a different location, which unfortunately causes all previous data (ID, settings, contacts) to be lost. Every affected user will receive a new ID and must re-add their settings and friends. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and are working on a fix.

items.title: Welcome to NullChat!
items.summary: NullChat v3.0 is here with a fresh new look.
items.detail: This update includes a new UI, group calls, encrypted chat persistence, and much more. Check the version history for all changes.
